reports.suggestion_message:
to solve this problem, you can try the following approaches:

- update to a newer version to see if the issue has been fixed
  - nom v4.2.3 has the following newer versions available: 5.0.0-alpha1, 5.0.0-alpha2, 5.0.0-beta1, 5.0.0-beta2, 5.0.0-beta3, 5.0.0, 5.0.1, 5.1.0, 5.1.1, 5.1.2, 5.1.3, 6.0.0-alpha1, 6.0.0-alpha2, 6.0.0-alpha3, 6.0.0-beta1, 6.0.0-beta2, 6.0.0-beta3, 6.0.0-beta4, 6.0.0-beta5, 6.0.0, 6.0.1, 6.1.0, 6.1.1, 6.1.2, 6.2.0, 6.2.1, 6.2.2, 7.0.0-alpha1, 7.0.0-alpha2, 7.0.0-alpha3, 7.0.0, 7.1.0, 7.1.1, 7.1.2, 7.1.3, 8.0.0-alpha1, 8.0.0-alpha2, 8.0.0-beta.1, 8.0.0

- ensure the maintainers know of this problem (e.g. creating a bug report if needed)
or even helping with a fix (e.g. by creating a pull request)
  - net2@0.2.39
  - repository: https://github.com/deprecrated/net2-rs
  - detailed warning command: `cargo report future-incompatibilities --id 1 --package net2@0.2.39`

  - nom@4.2.3
  - repository: https://github.com/Geal/nom
  - detailed warning command: `cargo report future-incompatibilities --id 1 --package nom@4.2.3`

- use your own version of the dependency with the `[patch]` section in `Cargo.toml`
For more information, see:
https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/overriding-dependencies.html#the-patch-section
